heading: Oath of members
label: 14103 Oath of members
text: Each member of a selection board convened under shall take an oath to perform the duties of a member of the board without prejudice or partiality, having in view both the special fitness of officers and the efficiency of the member’s armed force.section 14101 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3362(d), 5894, and 8362(d) of this title, prior to repeal by , (b)(2), (c)(1).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1629(a)(1)
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
